name: Rustpnews
short_desc: Self-hosted developer news aggregator and RSS polling service
author: rodrigomescua
description: Rustpnews is a high-performance, self-hosted developer news aggregator and RSS polling service built with Rust. It polls developer feeds, aggregates changes, and tracks news with configurable concurrency, paging, and overlaps.

form_fields.label: API Token
form_fields.hint: Token for accessing the Rust news API
